segments.text: God be merciful to us and bless us, And cause His face to shine upon us,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: That Your way may be known on earth, Your salvation among all nations.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let the peoples praise You, O God; Let all the peoples praise You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Oh, let the nations be glad and sing for joy! For You shall judge the people righteously, And govern the nations on earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let the peoples praise You, O God; Let all the peoples praise You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Then the earth shall yield her increase;
God, our own God, shall bless us.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: God shall bless us, And all the ends of the earth shall fear Him.
segments.speaker: God
